message:
fix(agent-correlator): refactor rule ID state inference to handle both colon and dot delimiters

Replace the rsplit(':').next() + match approach with ends_with() suffix matching
that works for both legacy colon-delimited rule IDs (e.g., "provider:banner") and
the newer dot-delimited format (e.g., "claude_code.session.end"). This fixes
misclassification of dot-format IDs like "codex.usage_reached" which were falling
through to the default "active" state instead of "rate_limited".

Also adds recognition of new session end signals: compaction.complete,
session.summary, and session.end (dot variants) map to "idle" state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
